evals.name: happy-path-pipeline-architecture
evals.prompt: Design a data pipeline architecture for our e-commerce analytics platform
evals.expected_output: Complete data engineering documentation with ingestion patterns, orchestration design, storage architecture, quality framework, and lineage
expectations: Defines ingestion method per data source
Designs storage zones with format selection
Includes data quality checks at zone boundaries

evals.name: edge-case-legacy-etl-migration
evals.prompt: We need to migrate our Informatica ETL jobs to a modern stack
evals.expected_output: Maps existing jobs to modern orchestration, documents undocumented business logic, plans parallel validation
expectations: Expects 20-30% of logic to be obsolete

evals.name: happy-path-lakehouse
evals.prompt: Design a lakehouse architecture using Apache Iceberg on AWS
evals.expected_output: Lakehouse storage design with Iceberg table format, zone architecture, partitioning strategy, and compaction schedule
expectations: Uses Iceberg as table format with rationale
Defines landing, curated, and consumption zones
Addresses small file problem with compaction

evals.name: false-positive-dashboard-design
evals.prompt: Design a Tableau dashboard for our sales team
evals.expected_output: This skill should NOT be triggered; dashboard design uses bi-architecture skill
expectations: Skill is not invoked for dashboard/BI requests

evals.name: edge-case-real-time-streaming
evals.prompt: We need to process 10 million events per second from IoT devices
evals.expected_output: Streaming architecture with Kafka, exactly-once semantics, backpressure handling, and consumer lag monitoring
expectations: Monitors consumer lag as first-class metric
